_meta.description: Known cross-bundle label-key collisions and their expected resolutions. The validator reads every *_hi_en.json bundle in app/src/main/assets/, builds a flat key → [bundle, value] map, and asserts that any collision is listed here with a matching expected resolution. Unlisted collisions fail validation.

resolved.resolution: Both aligned — was स्थान in restore, caused silent override
Both aligned — ग्राहक → कनेक्शन vocab swap applied globally

renamed.reason: Install needs the question 'सेटअप कौन करेगा?'; restore needs 'कौन ठीक करेगा?'. Same key, opposite verbs — renamed install side to break the collision. Restore keeps executor.title.

unresolved.install_semantic: customer-side check — 'ग्राहक की पुष्टि बाकी' (CSP waiting on customer)
unresolved.restore_semantic: system-side check — 'जाँच हो रही है' (Vyom checking)
unresolved.proposed_fix: Split into install.reason.verifying and restore.reason.verifying, update all readers

at_risk_shared._description: Generic keys that are fine today but could collide if any module adds them. Migrate to common_labels_*.json explicitly.
